title: Creators Right Hand
description: Adds all the building mods you could need.
body:
### **The Only Building Modpack You'll Ever Need**

#
This mod pack is aimed to those who seek a little more variety in their building palate. It  also adds many ambient mods that compliment the building experience. 
#
The pack is mostly intended to be played in creative mode but survival is also supported but you may not find as many adventure features as this pack was heavily curated with building and design in mind. 
#
We also put a lot of time into making sure the performance is just the way we want it. There are big plans for this pack in the future.


- [Discord](https://discord.gg/Vp4CadqsJC)

- [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@SauceBossNetwork)
